 {"id":"gt-3x0z.4","title":"Phase 2.1: gt spawn --molecule bonds in ephemeral","description":"Make gt spawn molecule-aware with ephemeral bonding.

## New Flag

```bash
gt spawn --issue gt-xxx --molecule mol-polecat-work
```

## Behavior

1. Create polecat with fresh worktree (existing)
2. Bond molecule in ephemeral: `bd mol bond mol-polecat-work --ephemeral`
3. Link molecule root to source issue
4. Include molecule context in work assignment mail
5. Start session

## Work Assignment Mail

```
Subject: Work Assignment: Fix lifecycle bug [MOLECULE]

You are working on gt-rixa as part of molecule mol-polecat-work.

Molecule instance: eph-abc123
Current step: read-assignment (1/8)

Follow the molecule workflow. When complete, generate summary and squash.
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.082722-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T17:25:15.106346-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T17:25:15.106346-08:00","close_reason":"Already merged to main","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.4","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.084965-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.4","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:40.385365-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.4","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:40.457259-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-3x0z.5","title":"Phase 2.2: gt prime shows ephemeral molecule context","description":"Update gt prime to detect and display ephemeral molecule state.

## Detection

1. Check for active ephemeral molecule assigned to current identity
2. Parse molecule progress (current step, total steps)
3. Show in prime output

## Output

```
🔧 Polecat furiosa, checking in.

📦 Molecule: mol-polecat-work (eph-abc123)
   Step 3/8: do-work
   Source: gt-rixa
   Started: 10 minutes ago

Run 'bd mol status' for full molecule state.
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"gastown/nux","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.164431-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T16:34:17.74355-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T16:34:17.74355-08:00","close_reason":"Closed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.16487-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T15:22:46.151626-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-3x0z.6","title":"Phase 2.3: Polecat CLAUDE.md molecule workflow protocol","description":"Update polecat prompting for molecule-based work.

## CLAUDE.md Updates

Add section on molecule workflow:

```markdown
## Molecule Workflow

When assigned a molecule (check gt prime output):

1. Follow molecule steps in order
2. Mark steps complete: bd mol step complete <step-id>
3. Before signaling done:
   a. Generate summary of work performed
   b. Run: bd squash <molecule-root> --summary "<your summary>"
4. Then signal done as normal

### Summary Guidelines

Your summary should include:
- What was the task?
- What did you do?
- What was the outcome?
- Any issues or follow-ups?

Keep it to 2-4 sentences. This becomes the permanent record.
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"gastown/rictus","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.24122-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T16:30:46.776078-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T16:30:46.776078-08:00","close_reason":"Added molecule workflow section to polecat.md.tmpl with step-by-step protocol and summary guidelines","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.6","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:33:45.241575-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.6","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T15:22:47.355729-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"gt-3x0z.7","title":"Phase 3.1: Summary generation protocol","description":"Define how agents generate summaries for squash.

## The Problem

Beads doesn't make AI calls (inversion of control). Gas Town agents must:
1. Generate their own summary before calling squash
2. Pass summary to bd squash command

## Summary Template

```
Task: <source issue title>
Action: <what was done - fix/implement/refactor/etc>
Outcome: <result - tests pass, committed, needs follow-up, etc>
Details: <1-2 sentences of specifics if needed>
```

## Example

```
Task: Fix lifecycle parser matching bug (gt-rixa)
Action: Reordered conditional checks in parseLifecycleRequest
Outcome: Tests passing, committed to polecat/furiosa
Details: The 'cycle' keyword was matching 'lifecycle:' prefix. Now checks restart/shutdown first, uses word boundary for cycle.
```

## Command

```bash
bd squash eph-abc123 --summary "Task: Fix lifecycle parser..."
```","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"gastown/furiosa","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:12.86627-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T18:04:27.434954-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.7","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:12.868178-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.7","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:40.530235-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

## Step Definitions

### generate-summary
Agent writes a concise summary following the template.
Save to a local variable or temp file.

### squash-molecule
Run: bd squash $MOLECULE_ROOT --summary "$SUMMARY"
This creates digest in main beads, cleans ephemeral.

 {"id":"gt-3x0z.9","title":"Phase 4.1: mol-deacon-patrol uses ephemeral","description":"Deacon patrol cycles run as ephemeral molecules.

## Current Deacon Loop

```
while running:
    check_heartbeat()
    check_mail()
    sleep(interval)
```

## Molecule-Based Loop

```
while running:
    mol = bd mol bond mol-deacon-patrol-cycle --ephemeral
    execute_cycle(mol):
        check_heartbeat()
        check_mail()
        log_status()
    summary = generate_cycle_summary()
    bd squash mol --summary summary
    sleep(interval)
```

## Benefits

- Each cycle is tracked
- Digests show daemon health over time
- Can query: 'show me patrol cycles from last hour'
- Crash mid-cycle → ephemeral shows where we were","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:13.026048-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:13.026048-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.9","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:13.026388-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.9","depends_on_id":"gt-3x0z.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T14:34:40.672531-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x0z.9","depends_on_id":"gt-rana.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T15:20:27.460976-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-3x1","title":"Update Refinery to use Beads merge queue","description":"Replace branch discovery with Beads queue in the Refinery module:

Current (internal/refinery/manager.go):
- Scans for polecat/* branches
- Creates MR objects on-the-fly

New:
- Pull from Beads: bd ready --type=merge-request
- Process each MR
- Close with merge commit: bd close <id> --reason="Merged at <sha>"
- Handle failures: bd update <id> --status=blocked --reason="..."

The Engineer (agent) becomes Beads-native.
The Refinery (module) provides the infrastructure.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-16T23:02:37.96436-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T15:24:39.1231-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T14:47:51.65991-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x1","depends_on_id":"gt-h5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-16T23:02:55.812433-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x1","depends_on_id":"gt-svi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-16T23:03:12.814463-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-3x1.1","title":"Engineer main loop: poll for ready merge-requests","description":"Implement the Engineer's main processing loop.

Loop structure:
1. Query: bd ready --type=merge-request
2. If empty: sleep(poll_interval), continue
3. Select highest priority, oldest MR
4. Claim: bd update <id> --status=in_progress
5. Process (delegate to other subtasks)
6. Repeat

Configuration:
- poll_interval: from rig config (default 30s)
- max_concurrent: from rig config (default 1)

The loop should be interruptible and handle graceful shutdown.

Reference: docs/merge-queue-design.md#engineer-processing-loop","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T13:50:57.022367-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-18T20:45:17.731441-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-18T20:14:35.321731-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-3x1.1","depends_on_id":"gt-3x1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-17T13:50:57.024225-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x1.1","depends_on_id":"gt-svi.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T13:53:09.832586-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x1.1","depends_on_id":"gt-svi.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T13:53:09.9547-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-3x1.1","depends_on_id":"gt-h5n.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-17T13:53:16.770078-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
